insights.title: Dot-ball pressure told a story
insights.body: Chennai Super Kings faced 46% dot balls — fewer scoring opportunities usually means a harder innings in T20 cricket.

insights.title: Death overs defined the tempo
insights.body: Chennai Super Kings scored at 9.75 runs per over in overs 16–20, 50% dots in that phase.

insights.title: Toss winner took the match
insights.body: Chennai Super Kings won the toss, chose to field, and won. Dataset average: toss winner wins ~51% of IPL games.
